title: Remove a Person Recongized as a Column Update
excerpt: Removing a person from a Person Column is currently not recognized as a column update. These types of updates then aren’t captured in automations. Feature request is for recognizing the removal of a person from a column …

posts.author: taz101108 (Jennifer Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml: Removing a person from a Person Column is currently not recognized as a column update. These types of updates then aren’t captured in automations. Feature request is for recognizing the removal of a person from a column as an update.
